title: Phase 16.11 — GSC Token Recovery + Validate Fix + Page 2 Push + Asset/Outreach — FINAL COMPLETE REPORT

task2_gsc_data_validation.result: Search Analytics API pull successful. 45 pages, 304 impressions (7d), 0 clicks, avg pos 33.2. Saved to gsc-live-data-corrected.json.
task2_gsc_data_validation.comparison_to_jun6: 304 imp (down 2.3% from 311), same zero clicks. Slight decline is noise — GSC has 2-3 day reporting lag.

task3_validate_fix_audit.result: 6 issue groups audited. SAFE TO VALIDATE: 404s only (after URL audit). NEVER VALIDATE: noindex pages, intentional canonical/redirect, cleanup lag. HOLD: Crawled-not-indexed (need URL audit). Report: .optimizer-data/gsc-validate-fix-decision-report.json
